subtopics.title: Double Entry System
common_misconceptions: Debit means increase and credit means decrease
You can record only one side of a transaction
Bookkeeping is the same as accounting
subtopics.teaching_note: Double entry: every transaction has two equal and opposite effects. Debit = left side, Credit = right side. Key rule: Debit the receiver, Credit the giver. For assets: Debit = increase, Credit = decrease. For liabilities: Debit = decrease, Credit = increase. Examples: Started business with ₦10,000 cash → Debit Cash, Credit Capital. Bought goods ₦5,000 cash → Debit Purchases, Credit Cash.
